text:
Nope, I've read the license and couldn't find anything resembling what
is claimed by upstream but IANAL so I cannot resolve this problem.

BTW. due to my mistake of using unicode sender name in my last
response and brokeness of gnats, I'm no longer included in followup
recipient list. When responding please make sure I'm CC'ed.
